raw_consumer_statement: I saw two money transfer charges, and one transfer fee charge, on my Citi card. They originated in XXXX, TX. I live in XXXX, TX. I never carry this card on my person. I keep it locked in my office, and used it for my husband 's caregiver charges. The charges are definitely NOT what I would do. I repeatedly asked Citi to take the charge off my account. After a month of " investigating '', they refused to take the charges off the account. I have referred the matter to the Attorney General in Texas, and now I'm referring it to your Bureau, also.
